_meta.scope: Official CAR / non-commercial driver handbooks — 50 states + DC (51 total). Motorcycle and CDL manuals intentionally excluded.
_meta.source: Official state .gov sources, verified via a 5-agent sweep on 2026-06-14.
caveats: EDITION CHURN: most are revised every 1-2 years; because the app cites specific PAGE numbers, every re-pagination can invalidate citations. Re-validate editions on a schedule.
'edition' is the surfaced revision/date or form number; 'unknown' = not captured, check the live page.
DOMAIN MIGRATIONS in progress: South Carolina (scdmvonline.com -> dmv.sc.gov) and Pennsylvania (dmv.pa.gov -> pa.gov). Re-validate those URLs.
BROWSER-CHECK NEEDED: South Dakota and Wyoming exact current-edition filenames (bot-blocked / older PDF surfaced); New Mexico manual is dated 2019-11-19.
Texas is online-only since 2017 (Form DL-7); exact deep-link not captured — locate current handbook on dps.texas.gov.
url prefers the direct PDF where captured, else the official landing page.

handbooks.title: Driver License Manual (Class D)
handbooks.agency: Alabama Law Enforcement Agency (ALEA) — Dept. of Public Safety
handbooks.notes: Landing page; PDF 'ALEA DL Manual.pdf'.

handbooks.title: Arizona Driver License Manual and Customer Service Guide
handbooks.notes: Form 99-0117. COMBINED doc — study manual bundled with a Customer Service Guide.

handbooks.title: Arkansas Driver License Study Guide
handbooks.agency: AR Dept. of Public Safety — Office of Driver Services
handbooks.notes: Titled a 'Study Guide'; versioned by Edition. This is the app's current home state.

handbooks.title: California Driver's Handbook
handbooks.notes: Cites by section (not page). Large handbook ecosystem (RV, ambulance, parent-teen also exist).

handbooks.title: Colorado Driver Handbook
handbooks.agency: CO Dept. of Revenue — Div. of Motor Vehicles
handbooks.notes: Form-numbered; includes CO-specific mountain-driving content.

handbooks.title: Official Florida Driver License Handbook
handbooks.agency: FL Dept. of Highway Safety and Motor Vehicles (FLHSMV)

handbooks.title: Driver's Manual
handbooks.notes: Teens also need the ADAP Student Manual (alcohol/drug awareness).

handbooks.title: Hawaii Driver's Manual
handbooks.agency: Hawaii DOT — Motor Vehicle Safety Office
handbooks.notes: 13+ languages; licensing administered by the 4 counties.

handbooks.title: Rules of the Road
handbooks.notes: Also a separate 'Rules of the Road Review Workbook' (DSD DS9) study aid.

handbooks.title: Indiana Driver's Manual
handbooks.notes: Published as chapter-split PDFs.

handbooks.title: Iowa Driver's Manual
handbooks.notes: ~25 languages; separate Moped Manual also exists.

handbooks.title: Kansas Driving Handbook (Non-Commercial Driver's Manual)
handbooks.agency: Kansas Dept. of Revenue — Division of Vehicles

handbooks.title: Kentucky Driver Manual
handbooks.notes: QUIRK: hosted on the State Police domain, not the Transportation Cabinet.

handbooks.title: Class D & E Driver's Guide
handbooks.agency: Louisiana Office of Motor Vehicles (OMV) — DPS
handbooks.notes: Doc on a PowerDMS portal: public.powerdms.com/LADPSC/documents/347039.

handbooks.title: Maine Driver's License Manual (Maine Motorist Handbook and Study Guide)
handbooks.agency: Bureau of Motor Vehicles (within Sec. of State)
handbooks.notes: Two interchangeable names for the same doc.

handbooks.title: Maryland Driver's Manual
handbooks.notes: Separate 'Rookie Driver' new-driver practice guide (RD-006) also exists.

handbooks.title: Driver's Manual (Class D / Passenger Vehicles)
handbooks.notes: ~16 languages. Direct PDF may 403 to bots; landing: mass.gov/lists/drivers-manuals.

handbooks.title: What Every Driver Must Know
handbooks.notes: Distinctively named, not 'driver's manual'.

handbooks.title: Minnesota Driver's Manual (Class D)
handbooks.agency: Dept. of Public Safety — Driver & Vehicle Services

handbooks.title: Mississippi Driver's Manual
handbooks.agency: MS Dept. of Public Safety — Driver Service Bureau

handbooks.title: Missouri Driver Guide
handbooks.notes: Called a 'Driver Guide'; testing by State Highway Patrol.

handbooks.title: Montana Driver Manual
handbooks.agency: MT Dept. of Justice — Motor Vehicle Division
handbooks.notes: Issued by DOJ (mvdmt.gov / dojmt.gov).

handbooks.title: Nebraska Driver's Manual (Class O)
handbooks.notes: Car license is 'Class O' in NE.

handbooks.title: Nevada Driver's Handbook
handbooks.notes: ~79 pages.

handbooks.title: New Hampshire Driver's Manual (Operator)
handbooks.agency: Division of Motor Vehicles (Dept. of Safety)

handbooks.title: New Jersey Driver Manual
handbooks.notes: Motorcycle content folded in (Ch. 9).

handbooks.title: New Mexico Driver Manual
handbooks.agency: Motor Vehicle Division — NM Taxation & Revenue
handbooks.notes: PDF on realfile.tax.newmexico.gov; notably old.

handbooks.title: New York State Driver's Manual
handbooks.notes: Also published chapter-by-chapter online with practice tests.

handbooks.title: North Dakota Noncommercial Driver License Manual
handbooks.notes: Text + Spanish + audio versions offered.

handbooks.title: Ohio Driver Manual (Digest of Motor Vehicle Laws)
handbooks.notes: Dual-named; distributed via a forms hub, not one fixed PDF.

handbooks.title: Oklahoma Driver Manual
handbooks.notes: Issuing agency changed to Service Oklahoma.

handbooks.title: Oregon Driver Manual
handbooks.notes: Also full online HTML + audio. PDF: /odot/Forms/DMV/37.pdf.

handbooks.title: Pennsylvania Driver's Manual
handbooks.notes: Site migrated dmv.pa.gov -> pa.gov; re-validate URL.

handbooks.title: Rhode Island Driver's Manual
handbooks.notes: Motorcycle is a section (VI) inside this manual.

handbooks.title: South Carolina Driver's Manual
handbooks.notes: Domain migrating scdmvonline.com -> dmv.sc.gov; re-validate. Separate large/rec-vehicle manual also exists.

handbooks.title: South Dakota Driver License Manual
handbooks.agency: SD Dept. of Public Safety — Office of Driver Licensing
handbooks.notes: DPS site behind a ServiceNow proxy; confirm latest PDF in a browser.

handbooks.title: Tennessee Comprehensive Driver License Manual
handbooks.agency: TN Dept. of Safety & Homeland Security
handbooks.notes: 'Comprehensive' is part of the official title; large PDF (>10 MB).

handbooks.title: Texas Driver Handbook
handbooks.notes: Form DL-7; direct PDF at /internetforms/forms/dl-7.pdf.

handbooks.title: Vermont Driver's Manual
handbooks.notes: Audio version also published.

handbooks.title: Virginia Driver's Manual
handbooks.notes: Form DMV 39; complete-manual PDF at /webdoc/pdf/. (The /forms/ path is a stub.)

handbooks.title: Washington State Driver Guide
handbooks.notes: Called a 'Driver Guide'; ~7 languages; separate text-only version.

handbooks.title: Wisconsin Motorists' Handbook
handbooks.notes: Recently rewritten in plain language.

handbooks.title: State of Wyoming Driver License Manual (Rules of the Road)
handbooks.notes: WYDOT Driver Services -> Help Documents and Manuals; confirm latest edition filename in a browser.

handbooks.title: DC DMV Automobile Driver Manual
handbooks.notes: District, not a state. Flipbook + downloadable PDF (issuu.com/dcdmv).
